metadata.description: On Fandango, purchase 3 tickets for any currently showing thriller at Regal Union Square in New York, select an upcoming Friday evening showtime after 6 PM, choose 3 adjacent seats in rows D–F center section

common_info.email_credentials: credentials to use the assigned disposable email account

common_info.user_resume: PDF resume with disposable email account injected
